notes: Fixes invisible-title bugs in two flavors: near-white text on transparent backgrounds (#fafafa/#fcfcfc/#f5f5f5 and similar — now caught by validator + banned by prompt rule) and SVG <text fill="none"> (the SVG-syntax cousin — also now caught + banned). Both were producing empty-looking header bars in Redesign renders. 'What Claude built' label renamed to 'What Abstractor built'.
